heading: State and local assistance and jurisdiction
label: 460zz–5 State and local assistance and jurisdiction

children.heading: Grants
children.label: a Grants
children.text: Upon approval of the plan under , the Secretary is authorized to make grants to the State of Minnesota, or its political subdivisions, to cover not more than 50 percent of the cost of acquisition and development within the Area of lands and waters or interests therein in a manner consistent with the purposes of this part.section 460zz–2 of this title

children.heading: Cooperative agreements
children.label: b Cooperative agreements
children.text: The Secretary is authorized to enter into cooperative agreements with the State of Minnesota or any political subdivision thereof pursuant to which he may assist in the planning for and interpretation of non-Federal publicly owned lands within the Area.

children.heading: Technical assistance
children.label: c Technical assistance
children.text: To enable the State of Minnesota and its political subdivisions to develop and implement programs compatible with the plan, the Secretary shall provide such technical assistance to the State and its political subdivisions as he deems appropriate.

children.heading: State and local jurisdiction
children.label: d State and local jurisdiction
children.text: Nothing in this part shall diminish, enlarge, or modify any right of the State of Minnesota or any political subdivision thereof, to exercise civil and criminal jurisdiction or to carry out State fish and wildlife laws, rules, and regulations within the Area, or to tax persons, corporations, franchises, or private property on the lands and waters included in the Area.
